2025-26 Indiana State Sycamores Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 11-21 (4-16, 10th in MVC MBB)

Coach: Matthew Graves

PS/G: 73.6 (241st of 365)

PA/G: 74.5 (199th of 365)

SRS: -3.11 (195th of 365)

SOS: 0.29 (135th of 365)

ORtg: 104.7 (287th of 365)

DRtg: 106.0 (153rd of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +200000
